name: Robotics (ROS/ROS2, Control, Sensing)
description: 机器人开发:ROS/ROS2、控制回路与传感器融合

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['robotics','ros','control','sensors'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(robotics|ros2?|control loop|sensor fusion|actuator|coordinate frame|\btf2?\b|pid controller|robot operating system)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
